title: Circus Tent Paper Party Napkins x 16, Fun Circus-Themed Napkins, Childrens Party Napkins, Funfair Party tableware
features: CIRCUS TENT NAPKINS - Add a vibrant pop of colour to your celebration with these Circus Tent Paper Napkins. Featuring a playful and iconic circus tent design, they bring a fun, festive vibe to your party. Whether you're hosting a birthday, carnival, or themed event, these napkins will help create the perfect atmosphere for your guests to enjoy.

FUN AND FESTIVE TABLESETTING - These napkins are not only stylish but also practical for any celebration. Made from high-quality paper, they’re perfect for wiping up spills, serving as cocktail napkins, or as part of your table décor. The pack of 16 ensures there's enough for all your guests, making cleanup easy while adding a cheerful touch to your event.
CIRCUS THEME - We offer a range of Circus-themed party products and decorations, to ensure fun and excitement at any occasion!
SHARE WITH US - Tag us at @luckandluckshop with your creation. We love to see our products in use.
